text: Fig P. Four-point roll on the upline
Half Cuban. Three-quarter opposite roll on the 45 upline
column4: half roll on exit. Exit inverted.

column3: three-quarter opposite roll and quarter roll at the top.

text: Hammerhead. Half roll on the upline
column3: three-quarter negative snap then three-quarter roll on the downline.

text: P Loop. Two full rolls on entry
Double Humpty. Half roll on the downline
column4: three-quarter positive snap on the upline. Exit inverted.

text: Half Reverse Cuban. One and a half negative snaps on the downline
column4: half roll opposite half roll on exit. Exit inverted.

text: Spin. One and three-quarter inverted turns. Quarter roll
Tear Drop. Three-quarter negative snap and quarter roll on the upline
Sharks Tooth. One and a quarter roll
column3: opposite quarter roll on the 45 upline. Half roll on the downline.
